races.name: RVRR 'train'ing Run
races.notes: This is a fun run event with flexible distances ranging from 2.8mi to 34.6.  The paces are 7:30, 8:30, 9:30, 10:30, 12, and 15.

races.name: Pine Beach 5k
races.notes: A 5K that a few of us will be doing

races.name: Bridge to Bridge Relay Race
races.notes: Teams of 4 to 7, message in the group or post on Facebook to join or form a team!
